subcodes.first_line: O revered consort of the martyr! Thou art ever the object of the Blessed Beauty's gracious regard - may my spirit be sacrificed for His sacred dust [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حرم محترمه شهید همواره مشمول نظر عنایت جمال مبارک روحی لتربته الفداء هستی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude, @martyrs and martyrdom
